## Documentation and maintenance

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if needed
- [ ] JSDoc / inline docs updated if needed
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Checklist

- [ ] The bug is reproducible and the fix addresses the stated root cause
- [ ] Tests cover the reported behavior or regression
- [ ] Error handling and edge cases were reviewed
- [ ] The fix is minimal and avoids unrelated refactors
- [ ] Public behavior changes are documented

## Additional notes

Add screenshots, logs, stack traces, recordings, or anything else useful for review.
